content_body:
FREE Pontoon Boat Tour with your Memorial Day Reservation!

Memorial Day is a time to honor and remember those who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. It's also the unofficial start of summer, and many people take advantage of the long weekend to travel and spend time with family and friends. What better place to celebrate the start of summer than Blue Ridge, GA with a very special offer ~ a FREE 1-hour pontoon boat ride on Lake Blue Ridge for Memorial Day reservations.

A pontoon boat ride is an excellent way to enjoy the beautiful Blue Ridge scenery, breathe fresh mountain air, and even take a dive into the crystal clear turquoise waters of Lake Blue Ridge. It's a great activity for families, couples, and groups of friends, and it's sure to create memories that will last a lifetime.

When booking your Memorial Day reservation, call us at 706-432-2140 to reserve your cabin AND specify the time you would like to take a spin out on the lake.

 

Pontoon Boat Tour Schedule:

Saturday, May 27 beginning at 10:00a.m. - 7:30p.m.
 

Photos of Coach 243 PFC Pontoon Boat

 

If Mother Nature has other plans and rain is in the forecast and it looks like it may prevent a free pontoon boat ride, we will let you know. Your safety and comfort are our priority. We will keep an eye on the radar and check the forecast frequently to see if there are any updates or changes. If it looks like the rain will pass quickly, you may be able to reschedule the boat ride for later in the day.
title: Pontoon Boat Tour
